Everything You Need

Built for Real Cricket

Every feature designed for how street cricket is actually played — flexible teams, no umpires, street rules your way.

🏏
Ball-by-Ball Scoring
Every delivery recorded in real time — runs, wides, no-balls, byes, leg-byes, wickets. The full scorecard, batting card, and bowling card build themselves automatically. One thumb, one tap.
Core Feature
📶
100% Offline
No Wi-Fi? No problem. All data lives on your device. Score from any ground, rooftop, or gully — any time.
Works Anywhere
🎲
Fair Team Generator
Shuffle your squad into balanced teams instantly. Supports 2 or 3 teams, walk-in guests, and saves the split as a shareable PNG card.
📊
Full Scorecard
Batting card, bowling card, fall of wickets, over-by-over breakdown — everything auto-built the moment the last ball is bowled. Export as a sharp PNG or share as text.
Auto-Generated
📋
Match History
Every match saved. Browse all past games grouped by date, filter by live or completed, and pull up any full scorecard in seconds.
🎯
Street Cricket Rules
One-tip-one-hand, last man stands, no LBW, free hit on no-ball, max overs per bowler — toggle every street rule on or off per match.
📤
Share Scorecards
Export a premium PNG scorecard image with the full batting and bowling stats. Share to the group chat the moment the last ball is bowled.
↩️
Instant Undo
Wrong button? One tap undoes the last delivery — no pop-ups, no confirmations, no lost balls.
No Mistakes Stick
👥
Saved Squads
Save your regular crew once. Pick players in seconds every time you start a new match — no typing names again.
∞
Matches tracked
₹0
Cost, forever
0s
Sign-up time
100%
Offline ready
Simple as Cricket Itself

Three Steps to Your First Match

No tutorial needed. Pick it up mid-match and you'll have it down in two overs.

01
Set up the match
Team names, overs, players per side. Toggle any street rules. Flip a coin for the toss. Done in 60 seconds.
02
Tap to score
Big thumb-friendly buttons for every outcome — 0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, Wicket, Wide, No-Ball. One tap each.
03
Share the result
Full scorecard ready the moment the last ball is bowled. Tap Share and a premium PNG lands in the group chat instantly.
"

Street cricket deserves a scorer as good as Test cricket gets.
Now it has one.

— Built for every gully, mohalla & rooftop ground

📲

Add to Your Home Screen

CricScore is a Progressive Web App. Installs like a native app, launches full-screen, works completely offline — no App Store needed.

1
Open in Chrome on your Android device
2
Tap the three-dot menu → "Add to Home screen" or "Install app"
3
Launch full-screen from your home screen — no browser bar
1
Open in Safari on your iPhone or iPad
2
Tap the Share icon (square with arrow) → "Add to Home Screen"
3
Tap "Add" — it launches full-screen, just like a native app
1
Open in Chrome, Edge, or Brave on your computer
2
Click the install icon in the address bar (or browser menu → "Install")
3
Opens as a standalone app — score matches from your desktop too
🏏  Open CricScore

Ready for the
Next Match?

No downloads. No accounts. Just open and start scoring.

🏏  Start Scoring — It's Free
✓ Works offline ✓ Free forever ✓ No account
